data.title: News Corp Trims ASX CDI Float as Buyback Lifts NASDAQ-Listed Stock
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh ( (AU:NWS) ).

News Corporation has reported updated figures for its CHESS Depositary Interests on issue for March 2026, showing a decline in CDIs over both its Class B voting and Class A non-voting common stock. The number of NWS Class B CDIs fell to 41,565,396 and NWSLV Class A CDIs to 892,492, primarily due to net transfers between CDIs and common stock quoted on NASDAQ.

Correspondingly, the volume of underlying Class B common stock not represented by CDIs rose to 141,891,859 shares, reflecting movements between CDIs and common stock as well as share cancellations under the company’s buyback program. These shifts indicate ongoing capital management and investor preference for holding News Corp equity either directly on NASDAQ or via ASX-traded CDIs.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NWS) stock is a Buy with a A$44.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh stock, see the AU:NWS Stock Forecast page.

More about News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh

News Corporation is a global media and publishing company with a primary listing on NASDAQ and CDIs quoted on the ASX under the code NWS. It operates through a portfolio of news, information, and related media assets, and uses CHESS Depositary Interests to facilitate trading of its U.S.-listed common stock in the Australian market.

Average Trading Volume: 252,315

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$20.98B

data.title: Lundin Mining Sets Hybrid AGM, Files Modern Slavery Report and Schedules Q1 Results Call
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lundin Mining ( (TSE:LUN) ) has shared an update.

Lundin Mining has scheduled its annual meeting of shareholders for May 7, 2026, in a hybrid format in Vancouver and via live webcast, with investors able to vote electronically or by proxy on routine items such as director elections, auditor appointment, executive pay and a shareholder proposal. The company is using electronic distribution of meeting materials to streamline access for investors on both the Toronto and Nasdaq Stockholm listings, and has outlined special voting procedures for Euroclear‑registered shareholders in Sweden.

The miner also disclosed that it has filed its Modern Slavery Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, underscoring an ongoing focus on responsible development and supply‑chain oversight. In a further marker for investors, Lundin Mining will release first‑quarter 2026 results after market close on May 6, followed by a webcast and conference call on May 7, offering updated insight into operational and financial performance as it pursues its copper‑focused growth strategy.

More about Lundin Mining

Lundin Mining is a Canadian base metals producer headquartered in Vancouver, with three operating mines in Brazil and Chile focused on copper and other commodities that support modern infrastructure and electrification. The company aims to become a top‑ten global copper producer through a growth strategy that includes advancing a major copper, gold and silver project in the Vicuña District on the Argentina‑Chile border, where it holds a 50% interest.

The latest update is out from Ion Video ( (AU:IOV) ).

ION Video Limited has converted 700,000 convertible notes into 8,229,997 fully paid ordinary shares, which rank equally with its existing share capital. The company has issued a cleansing notice confirming compliance with its financial reporting and continuous disclosure obligations, allowing the new shares to be traded within 12 months without a prospectus, thereby enhancing liquidity for noteholders and potentially broadening its shareholder base.

The conversion strengthens Ion Video’s capital structure by replacing debt-like convertible instruments with equity, which may reduce financing risk and clarify the company’s balance sheet for investors. By confirming that there is no excluded information requiring disclosure, the board signals regulatory compliance and transparency, which could support market confidence as the company advances its patented video virtualisation technology in the infrastructure sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:IOV) stock is a Hold with a A$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ion Video stock, see the AU:IOV Stock Forecast page.

More about Ion Video

ION Video Limited is an infrastructure technology company listed on the ASX that has developed patented systems to virtualise video at the file architecture level, converting static video files into programmable data. Its four foundational patents enable intelligent systems to access and recombine existing video content as programmable data without the need for transcoding, positioning the firm in advanced video infrastructure and data-centric media workflows.

data.description:

An announcement from Osisko Development ( (TSE:ODV) ) is now available.

Osisko Development has granted 1,104,400 stock options and 1,426,600 restricted share units to senior officers and non-executive employees as part of its annual compensation cycle under its omnibus equity incentive plan. The options are exercisable at C$4.51 per share, vest in three equal tranches over three years and expire in 2031, while the RSUs will cliff vest in 2029 subject to time and performance conditions.

The award structure ties a significant portion of employee compensation to long-term share performance and project execution, reinforcing alignment between management, staff and shareholders. By using security-based incentives with multi-year vesting, Osisko Development is seeking to support retention of key personnel and focus the organization on delivering its growth strategy across the Cariboo and Tintic projects.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ODV) stock is a Hold with a C$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Osisko Development stock, see the TSE:ODV Stock Forecast page.

More about Osisko Development

Osisko Development Corp. is a North American gold development company focused on revitalizing past-producing mining camps with district-scale potential. Its primary objective is to become an intermediate gold producer through the development of its fully permitted, 100%-owned Cariboo Gold Project in central British Columbia, supported by the Tintic Project in Utah, a brownfield asset with significant exploration upside and existing infrastructure.

The company concentrates on long-life mining assets in mining-friendly jurisdictions, emphasizing disciplined capital allocation, prudent development risk management and systematic mineral inventory growth. This strategic focus positions Osisko Development to scale its production profile while leveraging historical data and infrastructure in established mining districts.

data.title: Legacy Minerals addresses ASX query over share price surge and pending assay results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Legacy Minerals Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:LGM) ).

Legacy Minerals has responded to an ASX price and volume query after its shares climbed from A$0.145 to A$0.195 amid a spike in trading, stating it is not aware of any undisclosed information that would explain the move. The company confirmed it has incomplete assay results from recent drilling and surface sampling at the Mascotte Prospect, with delays driven by a fuel-related transport backlog and standard 5–8 week laboratory turnaround times.

Management said it has received assays for drill hole MSDD002 but is awaiting results for holes MSDD003 to MSDD006, and will only release data once all results are verified to avoid partial or potentially misleading disclosure. Legacy emphasised that unverified exploration data is being kept confidential under its trading and information-control policies, and that MSDD002 has not delivered material results relative to current geological understanding, aiming to reassure investors and the regulator about fair market conduct.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LGM) stock is a Hold with a A$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Legacy Minerals Holdings Ltd. stock, see the AU:LGM Stock Forecast page.

More about Legacy Minerals Holdings Ltd.

Legacy Minerals Holdings Ltd. is an Australian mineral exploration company listed on the ASX under the ticker LGM. The company focuses on gold and other mineral exploration, using drilling, soil sampling and rock chip sampling to evaluate prospects such as its Mascotte Prospect in New South Wales.

Average Trading Volume: 624,854

data.title: Mexan’s Controlling Shareholder Moves to Place Entire Stake in Major Ownership Shake-Up
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Mexan ( (HK:0022) ).

Mexan Limited’s controlling shareholder, Winland Wealth (BVI) Limited, which is indirectly wholly owned by chairman and executive director Lun Yiu Kay Edwin, has entered into a placing agreement with Advent Securities (Hong Kong) Limited. The agreement covers the potential placing of between about 928.7 million and 1.33 billion existing shares at HK$0.17 each to independent investors.

The planned transaction represents up to approximately 67.47% of Mexan’s issued share capital and all of the shares currently held by the controlling shareholder, meaning that, if fully executed, Winland Wealth will cease to hold any shares and will no longer be a controlling shareholder. The placing agent has committed to ensure that no individual placee, alone or with concert parties, will hold 30% or more of Mexan’s issued share capital after completion, signaling an intention to diversify the shareholding base and avoid triggering mandatory takeover obligations.

Completion of the placing is scheduled on or before 14 April 2026, subject to the terms of the agreement, and the company has cautioned that the placing may or may not proceed. The potential exit of the controlling shareholder, and consequent shift to a more dispersed ownership structure, could materially reshape Mexan’s governance dynamics and market positioning, with investors advised to exercise caution when dealing in the shares during this transition period.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0022) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.28 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mexan stock, see the HK:0022 Stock Forecast page.

More about Mexan

Mexan Limited, listed in Hong Kong under stock code 22, is a Hong Kong-based company whose shares are held by a controlling shareholder through Winland Wealth (BVI) Limited. The board is led by chairman and executive director Lun Yiu Kay Edwin, with additional executive and independent non-executive directors overseeing corporate governance and compliance with local listing regulations.

The company operates under the regulatory framework of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and the Securities and Futures Ordinance, indicating its focus on maintaining listing status and adherence to market disclosure rules. Its shareholder base and control structure are central to its corporate profile, with significant ownership previously concentrated in the hands of the controlling shareholder via the BVI entity.

Mexan’s governance structure features a mix of executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting standard corporate practices in Hong Kong’s listed market. This framework positions the company within the broader Hong Kong capital market, where changes in controlling ownership can materially affect investor perception and trading dynamics.

Average Trading Volume: 7,655,369

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$487.7M

For a thorough assessment of 0022 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mannatech Delays Annual Report Amid Liquidity Concerns
data.description:
Mannatech ( (MTEX) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mannatech, Incorporated has notified regulators that it will delay filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the year ended December 31, 2025, via a Form 12b-25. The company says the delay concerns its annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report), not any prior quarterly Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) or other periodic filings.

Management explains that its independent auditor raised the possibility of a going concern issue, prompting a deeper review. The company needs more time to assess the implications, consult third-party tax advisers, and finalize a cost-reduction plan to address liquidity pressures.

The delay follows a year of declining net sales, operating losses, and negative operating cash flow that created liquidity constraints. These issues are central to the going concern evaluation and are driving the need for additional analysis and remediation planning.

Mannatech expects to file its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within fifteen calendar days of the original due date, as allowed under SEC rules. Investors should note that the company indicates it has filed all other required reports over the past 12 months and does not anticipate significant changes in operating results versus the prior year.

The company does not provide preliminary financial figures in this notice and characterizes its expectations about future filing and remediation as subject to further review. Any forward-looking statements, including going concern considerations and cost-cutting outcomes, remain dependent on management’s ongoing analysis and external advice.

Mannatech emphasizes its intent to remain in compliance with SEC reporting requirements while it completes this additional work. The notification was signed on April 1, 2026, by Chief Executive Officer Landen Fredrick, underscoring executive-level responsibility for the delayed filing and remediation plan.

The most recent analyst rating on (MTEX) stock is a Hold with a $7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mannatech stock, see the MTEX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MTEX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MTEX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance: declining revenue, negative margins/ROE, and negative operating and free cash flow. Technicals are only mildly supportive (price above key moving averages but negative MACD), while valuation is pressured by losses reflected in the negative P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on MTEX stock, click here.

More about Mannatech
